title: viola cassinensis subsp. pseudogracilis
intro: Viola cassinensis subsp. pseudogracilis, also known as the slender violet or false gracile violet, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. It is a perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Viola cassinensis subsp. pseudogracilis include its ability to reduce inflammation and pain, improve immune function, and exhibit neuroprotective effects. The plant is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or topical cream, and it is traditionally used to treat a range of conditions, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues.
